input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
fname = 'articles/2026/02/26/articles.jsonl'
kws = ['iran war', 'iran attack', 'iran strike', 'israel strike iran', 'us strikes iran', 'trump iran', 'iran nuclear', 'vienna', 'manchester united', 'carrick', 't20 semi', 'world cup semi', 'oslo embassy', 'embassy bomb', 'beirut', 'hezbollah', 'iran world cup', 'fifa', 'champions league']
with open(fname) as f:
    for line in f:
        art = json.loads(line)
        title = (art.get('title','') or '').lower()
        for kw in kws:
            if kw in title:
                print(f'[{kw}] {(art.get(\"title\",\"\") or \"\")[:140]}')
                break
" 2>/dev/null | head -30
